articles.title: Uniswap officially expands exchange services to BNB Chain
articles.description: Uniswap, the world's largest decentralized exchange protocol by trade volume, has officially launched on BNB Chain.

articles.title: Forget HTTP: Ethereum has a new URL standard that can’t be blocked
articles.description: Under a newly rolled out Ethereum standard, DApps and NFTs can be accessed by internet users without the worry of centralized censorship.
